coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:48 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 7:48. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 96% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 96%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 96% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/8. 5:00 at 96%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 96%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/8. 5:00 at 88%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 88% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/8. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 6 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/8. 88% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% into session. 88%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/8. 5:00 at 96%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 34% complete. Rep 3/8. 96% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/8. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/8. 96% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/8. 96% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/8. 43% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 43% done. 4 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 43% done. 4 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/8. Power: 88-88%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/8. 27 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5 of 8. Target: 96% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 3 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 96%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 53% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 5/8. 96% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 63% done. 2 intervals left. 14 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6 of 8. Target: 88% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% through. This is your workout. Own it. 88% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6/8. 32 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 2 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 6. 2 to go. 14 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/8. 72% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 72% complete. Rep 7/8. 96% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 37 minutes of work done. 9 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 72% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 7. 1 to go. 9 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 88% for 5:00. Then 4min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 88% × 5:00. Then 4min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 88%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 88% for 5:00. Then 4min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 88% × 5:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
